## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::HopOff;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        HopOff { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
beer, brewery, drink, hop free, allergy, intolerance, diet

## Categories
food-beverage
